Um For me, I think, well, one, I think it's just an incredible tool.

I was really impressed with the product and what I really liked about it is that, you know, although MG hadn't at the time that I was there, adopted it as our um like we weren't using that as our market survey.
Say to send out, you know, managers are still having to do a market survey and submit that to, you know, our dropbox and all of that, you know, I believe that that was their vision.

It's certainly my vision to utilize that market survey to be able to uh one replace a lot of my on site team's time that they do and getting bad data obviously because, you know, people like, um and then also, you know, to kind of bolster my financial or my financial package to my owners, you know, to be able to include that for them when I'm sending them their monthly financial package.
Like here's your updated market survey and it's a much cleaner better document.
You know, I love the fact that, you know, where it would be nearly impossible for a manager or a leasing agent to benchmark 10 competitors, apartment IQ I can go in and I can do that.
You know, I can, I can sort data, I can add competitors, I can delete them.
I can actually get a much broader range of, you know, market analysis than I would ever be able to have the time to do on my own.
So I think so, I think that's gonna be something that's very impressive to our ownership.

And then because we don't use a revenue management program, I also believe wholeheartedly that I will be able to make quicker uh market pricing decisions based on the data that you guys provide and the recommendations, you know, where you guys are showing that a unit's price too low or, you know, kind of like the risk, you know what I'm up against and it gets granular to the unit level, which is huge.
And so to me, your tool is actually got an opportunity to replace revenue management in a way where people are using yields star because you kind of are providing that uh in my opinion.
So I think it's a no, it's an easy sell to my ownership because I will be able to increase market rates because of the data that I'll be able to receive quickly.

Um So it's really, it's just gonna come down to what pricing is gonna look like and how I can incorporate that because budgets are already finalized and, you know, probably having you send me um some sample reporting that I could share again because, you know, I'm going to, to do my best, you know, I, I would like it to go across my entire portfolio of conventional properties.
